signals.raw:
Drift Protocol Hack on Solana Confirmed: $280M+ Stolen on April 1** | YES | HIGH[4]  
Solana-based DeFi platform Drift Protocol suffered a major exploit on April 1, 2026, with attackers using social engineering on the Security Council multisig to drain at least $280 million in user deposits, wrapped BTC, Jito tokens, Fartcoin, and stablecoins; protocol functions suspended, team coordinating with l

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% (Up from 2.0%, Below 2.4% Forecast) | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][3]

Bank of Korea's 7th consecutive rate freeze at 2.5% announced Friday, citing March's 2.2% YoY CPI rise, won volatility, and Middle East-driven energy pressures—ruling out cuts[3]. This beat lowered expectations amid global volatility, potentially shifting prediction marke
